criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: The total number of downloads of the app.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: The design and ease of use of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The app's policies and measures for user data protection.
